diagram_title: Shared Context Structure — C4 Component Diagram

systems.name: OpenCode Runtime
systems.description: AI coding assistant with orchestrator/subagent architecture

containers.name: Session Engine
containers.description: Manages session lifecycle, message history, prompt loop, and compaction

containers.name: Tool Execution
containers.description: Tool dispatch, subagent worker pool, task delegation

containers.name: Storage Layer
containers.description: Persistent key-value storage for session data

components.name: SharedContext
components.description: Per-session structured knowledge space with incremental update, snapshot, and consolidation

components.name: PromptLoop
components.description: Main prompt processing loop; triggers SharedContext.updateFromTurn() after each assistant turn

components.name: SessionCompaction
components.description: Compaction engine; overflow path now prioritizes SharedContext snapshot over LLM compaction agent

components.name: TaskTool
components.description: Subagent dispatch; injects shared context snapshot (sync) before dispatch. No compaction logic.

components.name: Storage
components.description: Generic key-value storage; shared context persisted at key [shared_context, sessionID]

components.name: TokenEstimator
components.description: Token count estimation for budget management

components.name: MessageV2
components.description: Message and part data model; provides tool part state structure consumed by SharedContext

components.name: Config
components.description: Configuration provider; supplies sharedContext, sharedContextBudget, opportunisticThreshold settings

relationships.description: Calls updateFromTurn() after each assistant turn completes
Calls snapshot() before subagent dispatch to get injectable context
Calls idleCompaction() at turn boundary after detecting task dispatch (sync)
Calls snapshot() during overflow compaction to get summary
Reads and writes shared context space as JSON
Estimates token count for budget enforcement
Reads MessageV2.Part tool state for knowledge extraction
Reads compaction config to decide overflow path
Reads config to check sharedContext guard
